textByHash.04e593798830bc30f1ab3e519f75fa8048268cd3: Oh I'm not one to cause a fuss.
textByHash.0e6b7fb4285200a54a3ca925d33df50bbd75610a: Hello there! Nice weather we've been having.
textByHash.14221062cf260f333270ecf913adc6434d271a76: Go away. People from the outside shut us in like animals. I have nothing to say to you.
textByHash.158d4d06b871727f5d611b16fb8bb0aed0b58c8c: Do I know you? I'm in a hurry!
textByHash.1e9d98b5feec7402dc74d70a62166e0e9e3c991f: We don't have good days here anymore. Curse King Tyras.
textByHash.2576543629f7c8c835808c48f2b9ba063b48a336: Bah, those mourners... they're meant to be helping us, but I think they're doing more harm here than good. They won't even let me send a letter out to my family.
textByHash.2d59138b7d0c09dcfa81b98774a8873bc73b1fe6: No, I have nothing I wish to get rid of. If you want to do some trading, there are plenty of shops and market stalls around though.
textByHash.30ade685f0680d93b15e02809238cfc595ebcc50: I'm a little worried - I've heard there's lots of people going about, killing citizens at random.
textByHash.3718ce961173986aa10ac78c1ad6b6630a70fe82: I'll leave this place one day. You'll see.
textByHash.3c09c557181930394fbaaf43de3a1b36719c9d0b: An outsider! Can you get me out of this hell hole?
textByHash.442f756222e715b03f38448601f4af730942ce68: But you chased him so hard, that now I am free...
textByHash.449b7b7f4ea20c84b1f976a87dea7be24e41b35f: I'm sorry I can't help you there.
textByHash.4a082724b9f62d89843675ad624a63f0a35fad93: Plague? Pah, that's no excuse for the treatment we've received. It's obvious pretty quickly if someone has the plague.
textByHash.4ba0d11993a5051b0383b8b142b08c529128abe9: We'll starve without it though! You can't do this!
textByHash.4ca7e80478486aba4c5344d5629f255d8a825fa2: I don't trust that fish monger.
textByHash.503f1beb4ef50edb7401346afbedb77a2b336ea3: His army curses our city with this plague then wanders off again, leaving us to clear up the pieces.
textByHash.525f485ab967e962d07e1c72855d930c575a53ce: You're burning the food! We need that food!
textByHash.5e372d36c7c7fe41d78bcb794b6d5912e66caaa9: Well, ain't much either you or me can do about it.
textByHash.644c342a52d93de964147a2d65621daf44b16702: I think we need a new king. The one we've got isn't very good.
textByHash.7971cd05d96efeb9af2954697e4ddfe1c416cce7: I'll make sure everyone hears about this!
textByHash.7a0c4d16f9c8a10cb50e70efc650bf954334b2d4: Lighting fires in an enclosed space is probably not a good idea. Oh well.
textByHash.891c06480bff9efe06556dd8ab92dd10e8f49c6b: I guess it's not all bad down here. At least we have a pub.
textByHash.8c11b249d66d63167f1149f2f45dbcef68dcd866: Not for the last few days though... I thought maybe she'd gone home.
textByHash.8d0e633ebef5792295cfbc11a8488b73fbbe92ee: Can't you just leave me alone.
textByHash.8dfa01803753114edf0969ec6ef433c6c9fceaff: Not too bad, but I'm a little worried about the increase of goblins these days.
textByHash.906f38314f10653264898446e1d24c72598702ad: ... no, two of you... you can't count... ... maybe you drunk too much...
textByHash.98c022bdee43cce209b876cc225b2108f42d9f1a: Are you asking for a fight?
textByHash.9cdce6830e18e0ced82e4b17a935b50c8972598d: Keep your voice down! You've no idea who might be listening!
textByHash.a86d7084960b6d648ba1e48a7cd95524ff2cda18: I'm thinking about making a break for it. I'm perfectly healthy, not gonna infect anyone.
textByHash.a9b95cd5739d6b365d1f0c45aed460be0e7d2dba: No, I don't want to buy anything!
textByHash.b5b4a7197a1edb32b431e6593be425e80b46d191: I like our king, he's keeping the poor and infected away from us decent folk.
textByHash.b8835954b215e7729ad7d761bc3be85f31a99c13: Yes, I've seen her. Very helpful person.
textByHash.bba7d326212feb39855e13e4d9f996e3ebfe391e: Oh, I am but a poor maiden kidnapped by the evil Solus!
textByHash.bf0ff82e9c7cfdddc31a23c1682f48eb7f619725: He'll probably be at his home. You'll find it in the middle of town.
textByHash.bf1781db57051ea9c3a469df2065281394f08106: However, word on the streets is that Robert O'Reilly has been working with them. Perhaps he could help you. He lives in the middle of town.
textByHash.ce0d0173bbf278b6605db12cf6359d2628763f34: I've not heard of her. Old Jethick knows a lot of people, maybe he'll know where you can find her.
textByHash.d2f71bcdef695824fd4b2cde3003c86ec41133de: Not too bad, crazy to think that there wasn't actually a plague after all.
textByHash.d613a5fc928ef7e7186139ab905047ce55c52647: ... see... two of you... why there two of you?
textByHash.deac9369f0c4774feeb074f803864a8ab0c28ef3: I've heard there are many fearsome creatures that dwell under the ground...
textByHash.dfd5b8c1cfd4a968c94c6b1cf07582d37b926f92: Not too bad. Glad that plague hasn't touched the better areas of town.
textByHash.e6d0ce5f6e87fefd07fc66e4a00a06b6e9490845: Get out of my way, I'm in a hurry!
textByHash.ecd1640282e03f942fa60d142449991e9dffdac3: Oh thank you, you have freed me!
textByHash.f06bc3a42f9084fa45214e58e2ef04b35f60b471: No I don't! I keep my distance from that lot!
textByHash.f9e851a1e3a4a10a412dec9813881f0e1b96d2cf: No I don't have any spare change.
